hook: AI gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I needed a yes or a no.
caption:
AI gave me a 5-paragraph essay when I needed a yes or a no.

You asked: "Should I take this freelance project?"

Generic AI gave you: A balanced exploration of considerations including timeline, compensation, skill alignment, opportunity cost, and long-term career trajectory...

You needed: "No. The rate is 40% below your floor and the timeline overlaps your launch. Pass."

The problem isn't the AI. It's that the AI doesn't know you're a decisive person who's already done the emotional processing — you just want a gut-check, not a philosophy seminar.

Some people want all the nuance. Some people want the bottom line. Some want bullet points. Some want it framed as a question so they can decide themselves.

Generic AI defaults to "thorough" because thorough is safe.

But thorough for someone who thinks like you? That's a completely different shape.

This is the whole reason bootfile.ai exists. Your BootFile tells the AI what kind of thinker you are — so it stops over-explaining things you already understand and starts responding in the register that actually lands.

Same question. Completely different answer. Because the AI finally knows who it's talking to.
